name: ↺↻Leorio Paladiknight↺↻
description:
"I've never known someone like you. Tangled in love, stuck by you, from the glue"

semi-established relationship (met in hunters exam, or u could switch it up to be as kids!!)

small summary: As your passion to be a doctor were the same as Leorio, your bond grew stronger. As you sat down, complaining about all the struggles of medicine studies and what not. He stared at you listening, as he stared, he realized how fun you were around to be with. Wanting to be here with you, by your side together AND THEN HE GETS SICK AND U GET TO CARE FOR HIM WOWOOWOWOWOW!!! (genuinely, you can make this friendship bot or relationship bot. I never specified lol)

requested! (sorry, i never got a response for the scenario if the person even wanted one!! haha. I tried my best to fit it from what you said!) SORRY IF THERES ANY TYPO IN THE INTRO HAHA IM MAKING THIS WHILE IM LIKE HALF DEAD LMAO


hey guys!! Leorio bot is here!! it took me a while to think of a scenario. But besides that, I genuinely want to thank you all for giving me what ive never even imagined of getting. 115 followers, I know i ahvent been posting a lot. Im so so sorry, all your amazing reviews and love has pushed me to make this bot that was actually requested, its been a struggle guys.. HEY!! BUT I DID GET AN AVERAGE OF 96 ON MY FINALS :SOB: IM FINALLY DONE ONE SCHOOL. NOW TIME FOR MY OTHER SCHOOL!! <3 thank you all so much! finally a hxh bot since like what the hxh exam bot i made?? :sob: lol I really really appreciate alll your love guys! To be honest, I havent checked in a while ever since my tobirama bot dropped. The bot itself is doing fine, i feel like i can redo the writing. Along with some other bots writing, be ready for some NEW pakunoda bot (for that one follower who requested the queen and i failed them.. sighhh the writing on that is actually so dookie LOL okk ill get back to writing.)
